repo_rules: Do not edit WP core or 3rd-party plugins
Allowed zones: theme + mu-plugins + custom plugin (if exists); for this cycle prefer theme/mu-plugins only
Woo custom logic only via hooks/filters (custom plugin) — avoid unless required by UI polish
Staging must keep mu-plugin staging-safety enabled (mail/payments blocked, blog_public=0)
Deploy scope (later): wp-content/themes/<theme>, wp-content/themes/storefront, wp-content/mu-plugins, wp-content/plugins/<custom>
Fonts: Inter served from theme assets; preload only if file_exists

git_ops.note: No remote operations in this cycle.

non_goals: performance tuning beyond obvious layout shifts

L0: Build/check: ensure no PHP fatal errors after edits (load key pages)
Visual smoke: mobile viewport snapshots of header + hero + PDP action cluster
L1: Practical Woo flow (mobile): home → PLP → PDP (select qty) → add-to-cart → cart → checkout (stop before payment)
Collision checks (mobile): sticky header / sticky ATC vs recommendations/upsells, ensure no occluded CTAs
Dead space audit: above-the-fold hero and PDP action area (no excessive padding/margins)
L2: Only if regressions observed: repeat L1 across 2 breakpoints (e.g., 360px and 414px) + orientation switch

tech_gate: Re-enable technical verifier when git CLI fixed: git status/diff + lint/style checks used in repo
Confirm deploy-eligible file zones only (theme/storefront/mu-plugins/custom plugin)
regression_recheck: Repeat L1 Woo flow on latest changeset after tech gate passes
